description: The LegacyDirectionAdapter is used in converted legacy particle systems that were converted to PhotonDust as part of The Performance Updates.

fields.ForceDirection: Whether to force direction on the particles.
fields.EmitFromShell: Whether the particles should emit from the shell of the cylinder.
fields.Direction: The direction the particles should come from the cylinder.
fields.CapsDirection: The direction the particles should come from the caps of the cylinder.

usage: Not used by the user directly. Auto generated by the game.
